text.title: cicd-tls-validation-gate Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for cicd-tls-validation-gate as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Running the TLS gate only on initial setup and not on every deploy that touches TLS configuration.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Config drift is the primary source of TLS regressions. A web server upgrade, cipher list copy-paste from a Stack Overflow answer, or nginx config refactor can silently re-enable TLS 1.1 or weak ciphers. The gate must run on every TLS-touching deploy, not just once at setup time.
